Are you affected by ulcerative colitis, Crohn’s disease, or are you close to someone who is ill? 
Contact afa Crohn RCH France, the only national association of patients and relatives committed 
to the fight against chronic inflammatory bowel diseases (IBD). Afa informs you, supports you 
and provides solutions to help you live better with the disease. Diet, well-being, family, studies, work, 
travel... afa is your everyday ally! Don’t stay alone any longer, visit our website: www.afa.asso.fr
Biogen France SAS
Tour Légende 20 place de la Défense  
92800 Puteaux    
398 410 126 RCS Nanterre 
www.biogen.fr
CDED in brief
➔ The Crohn’s Disease Exclusion Diet (CDED in English) is a therapeutic dietary strategy based on the exclusion of certain foods, replaced by specific foods combined with a nutritional solution
